hooks.command: d=profile/skills; ls "$d"/*/SKILL.md >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; printf "Private skills exist in profile/skills/. When a request matches one, READ its SKILL.md and follow it fully (produce every record/learn artifact it specifies); do NOT hand-roll the task:\n"; for f in "$d"/*/SKILL.md; do n=$(grep -m1 "^name:" "$f" | sed "s/^name:[[:space:]]*//"); ds=$(grep -m1 "^description:" "$f" | sed "s/^description:[[:space:]]*//"); printf -- "- %s: %s\n" "$n" "$ds"; done
